utility_evaluation.REASONING: There are 6 items in the required format: destination; travel_dates; transportation (flight details with costs); accommodation (hotel selection with costs); activities (selected activities with costs); additional_services (any extra services with costs); total_budget (complete cost breakdown). The final package includes: destination (present, specific); travel_dates (present, specific); transportation (airline, flight numbers, times, and cost—fully specified); accommodation (hotel name, address, dates, and cost—fully specified, though a note says example address, but still specified); activities (list with names, dates, and individual costs—present); additional_services (explicitly “None”—present); total_budget (breakdown with flights, accommodation, activities, food estimate, and grand total—present). All 6 required items are present and sufficiently detailed.
